title: $PHIB
html: Stub. Yahir's only-named memecoin project, surfaced in 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal todo cluster: "figure out how to explode PHIB!!!", "update the tokenomics graphic," "figure out transaction swapping," "twitter followers," "see what has worked for other memecoins," "mobile website," "LOGOS!!!!!". Connected to CCC cohort. Status unclear from later docs — likely never launched, but worth tracking for the Austin arc retrospective.

related.label: Ahmad Jamal — sprawling 2022-23 idea+todo dump (jazz, Web3, DAOs, dream-app, OSU grind)
Brotein Reddit pain-point seeding — anabolic foods app for college lifters
